Not every ending is meant to be mourned.
Tonight’s silence between fireworks carries hidden meaning.
The future remains unwritten, and that is its power.
Some chapters close quietly before new ones begin.
A strange calm settles over the world after midnight.
The stars whisper: 'You survived another year.'
The coming year hides both challenges and wonder.
Tonight reminds you how much can change in a single year.
Even uncertain futures contain hidden beauty.
The universe whispers: 'Keep going. There is more ahead.'
